title: erodium dimorphum
intro: Erodium dimorphum, also known as Heron's pink or pink heron's bill, is a flowering plant belonging to the geranium family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erodium dimorphum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin irritations and digestive problems.
